content:
💡 pompelmi | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Securely scanning uploaded files for malware and threats within Node.js applications without sending data to external services.
✨ Key Features: • In-memory file scanning • YARA rule integration • ZIP bomb protection • Framework adapters (Koa, Fastify, Express) • Zero cloud dependencies
📖 Summary: Pompelmi is an open-source, privacy-first file scanning solution for Node.js applications. It focuses on scanning files in memory before they are saved to disk, offering features like YARA rule integration, ZIP bomb protection, and adapters for popular web frameworks.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
